overall.description: Static establishing shot of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape from Cyberpunk 2077, showing a waterfront district with dense slum architecture in the foreground contrasting against towering high-tech skyscrapers in the background. The scene is bathed in warm afternoon sunlight with clear blue skies, featuring a red bridge spanning the river on the left and industrial smoke rising from the lower buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront cityscape with dense urban architecture

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from an elevated fixed vantage point overlooking the river

entered.detail: large red suspension bridge spanning across the river with multiple support pillars
cluster of towering high-tech buildings with spires, antennas, and reflective glass facades
dense collection of low-rise makeshift buildings and structures stacked along the riverbank
calm dark water reflecting the cityscape with gentle ripples
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades showing colorful graphics
white smoke plumes rising from chimneys among the lower buildings

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view captures a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront cityscape under clear afternoon skies. The foreground features a dark river with a prominent red bridge on the left, while the right side shows dense shantytown architecture. In the background, towering futuristic skyscrapers with spires dominate the skyline, with industrial smoke rising from the lower districts and neon billboards visible on distant buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront that contrasts gritty urban decay with soaring high-tech ambition. It begins by capturing a dark river in the foreground, where a prominent red bridge anchors the left side of the frame. As the eye moves across the horizon, the scene shifts toward the right to reveal the dense, cluttered architecture of a shantytown. This low-lying industrial sprawl then gives way to a towering background of futuristic skyscrapers and spires that dominate the clear afternoon skyline. Finally, the vista is completed by the sight of industrial smoke rising from the lower districts and neon billboards flickering on distant buildings under a bright blue sky.
